necessityProof.blockerResolved: After archive verification renderer consolidation, route catalog cleanup evidence reports still repeated the same title/meta/section skeleton and the same evidence-file line format.
necessityProof.laterConsumer: N5 Phase-B review can now distinguish standard evidence-file report sections from genuinely local version guard, release continuity, and snippet sections.
necessityProof.reuseDecision: The report builder covers the markdown skeleton, while the new evidence-file helper covers the repeated id/present/resolvedPath/digest format. Version guard arrays and documentation snippet lines remain local because they are family-specific evidence narratives.
necessityProof.growthStopCondition: The helper stops at evidence file references with id, exists, resolvedPath, and digest. It is not reused for archive byteLength references or fake transport snippets.

focusedRendererBatch.command: npx vitest run test/verificationReportBuilder.test.ts test/governanceGrowthRatchet.test.ts and 6 route catalog cleanup evidence report tests --testTimeout=180000

byteIdenticalCompare.method: Temporary Vitest test loaded legacy renderer source from git HEAD, rewired imports to current source modules, loaded real reports, and asserted equality with each migrated renderer output.

lint.note: Warnings are the existing v2115 baseline and are outside this renderer-consolidation batch.

archiveDeliverables: 代码讲解记录_生产雏形阶段3/r2000/2098-renderer-consolidation-batch-10-v2127.md

crossProjectParallel.reason: v2127 only changes Node markdown rendering for existing route catalog cleanup reports; it does not request fresh sibling evidence, live integration, upstream service startup, or schema changes.
